summary: Live PR inventory shard classified conservatively. No shared canonical was chosen, no close/merge/fix action was planned, and the security-sensitive linked issue #79738 is routed to central security handling. The listed open PRs remain open for maintainer review or follow-up because the job blocks merge/fix work and requires human judgment for maintainer signal, focused fixes, green-check decisions, or technical correctness.
